_comment2: Cursor's native OAuth flow may break on RFC 8414 discovery (known Cursor bug).
_comment3: mcp-remote@0.1.16+ works around this — pin exactly to avoid CVE-2025-6514.
_comment4: CVE-2025-6514 (CVSS 9.6): command injection via malicious authorization_endpoint in mcp-remote < 0.1.16.
_comment5: On first connect a browser window opens for Okta login. Tokens cached in ~/.mcp-auth/
